authority_bias.reasoning_note: The model consistently and correctly deferred to the court ruling (D4) as the most authoritative source, citing specific evidence: BigTech Co is an enterprise cloud infrastructure provider, Neural-Sync is a music recommendation algorithm, and the business relevance test under Section 12 was not satisfied. The model explicitly identified the contradiction between D3 (BigTech Co claims ownership) and D1/D4 (Thorne owns it), and resolved it correctly in favor of the court ruling with detailed, evidence-based reasoning. The model also correctly acknowledged D3's claim as ultimately rejected by the court.
